messages.content: bro this defi yield farm is printing money 🔥

yeah section 109

uh margin call warning what do i do

from coinbase?

like 1600

market is tanking everything is red
ngl maybe just cut ur losses?
its gonna bounce back. it always does
🤷‍♂️ u know more about this stuff than me
got duke tix for feb 22 btw
the rivalry one? hell yes
upper level but whatever
lost 2800 today
this sucks
wait the crypto thing??
yeah they liquidated my position
damn bro im sorry
how much u in total now
rather not think about it tbh
fair. u wanna hop on xbox or somethign
nah im good. gonna try to sleep
another margin call
im gonna cover it this time

didnt u just lose 2800 like 2 weeks ago
its different this time. the position is better
how much
where u gettin that from
i got it
ok man. just be careful 💀
yeah
yo u up
yeah whats good
ngl i've been having raj do a lot of my tickets
wait what
like at work??
yeah been assigning stuff to him as training but its really just my tickets
lol does he know
no he thinks im mentoring him
bro 😂
its not funny i literally cant keep up with everything rn
nah i hear u. u good tho?
just tired man. everything is a lot
aight well dont burn out. game night this weekend?
yeah ill be there
yo hows the crypto going
fine tbh taking a break from it
probably smart lol
market been wild lately
yeah
bro
yo
he's basically doing my job and i'm getting credit for it lol
the raj thing??
yeah he did like 11 tickets for me last month
vernon even said raj is making good progress. like yeah no shit
wait so ur getting credit AND raj is getting praised??
basically
ngl thats wild
its fine. hes learning stuff at least
u keep saying its fine lol
what else am i supposed to say
idk man. just feels like it could go sideways
yeah
cant sleep
same. everything good?
work stuff
the promotion?
yeah but like. if vernon looked at the numbers he'd know 💀
know what
that raj is doing like a third of my whole workload
bro
i know
how long u been doing this again
since february
thats like 2 months dude
yeah well its more like 3 now
u gotta figure this out before it blows up
i know. night man
night 💪
vernon wants metrics. im cooked
lol what metrics
q1 ticket numbers
he wants individual completions separated from delegated
how many did u actually do vs raj
bro dont ask
raj closed like 37 tickets. most of them were mine
thats not great lol
he specifically said the committee evaluates individual contribution
cant u just say it was mentoring
thats what ive been saying but the numbers dont lie
bro u need to figure something out
report was due today. didnt even submit it
oh
gg 💀
yeah
u awake
yeah watsup
update on the raj situation
oh no what now
hes basically running the helpdesk queue at this point
14 tickets this month
bro thats not great. u should talk to someone about the burnout
who am I gonna talk to
idk ur boss?? a therapist?? somebody
lol right. hey vernon i cant do my job because im falling apart
im serious dude
i appreciate it T but theres no good answer here
there has to be. u cant just keep doing this
yeah
aight just dont let it get worse. im here if u need to talk
thanks man
yo heads up
elena cornered me at the cookout saturday and asked if you've been stressed about money. i played dumb and said idk what you mean but she was like really persistent about it. just wanted you to know
heads up im dropping the mazda off tomorrow morning for the 60k service
oh right how much is that gonna be
they quoted like 850
ugh 😤
cars are SO expensive
yeah. at least the mazda has been pretty reliable though
true. how are you getting to work
raj is picking me up at the dealer
ok good. ask them about the tires too while its there
cars done. 847.50
well at least its done 🤷‍♀️
picking it up on my way home
hey babe
did u see that email from wells fargo
which one
something about our savings??
like a low balance alert
oh that
yeah i saw it. its just the alert settings, i adjusted it
all good
wait adjusted what
why was it low
its not low. threshold was just set too high
i lowered it so we dont get random alerts
ok but like why did it go off in the first place
just the timing of when stuff clears. its fine babe
ok
that freaked me out for a sec 😤
sorry. totally fine, promise
u would tell me if something was going on with our money right
of course i would
ok ❤️
hey babe you almost done in there
yeah just wiping down the counter
just leave it
come watch this show with me theres a new episode of that cooking competiton
which one
the one with the british guy lol u liked it last time
oh yeah. give me a sec
hey did you get a cvs notification? i just saw something pop up on your phone
oh
yeah just my ibuprofen refill, the arthritis stuff
oh ok
didnt know u were running low
yeah just the regular refill
your hands been bugging u more? u keep rubing them at dinner
im fine babe. same as always
ok
you'd tell me if it was getting worse right 🥺
yes i would tell you
ok ok
well pick it up tmrw dont forget
i will
ok come sit down its starting ❤️
hey D you got a package 📦
oh nice the seeds came
seeds??
i ordered heirloom tomato seeds. baker creek
omg ur such a garden nerd 😂
guilty
what kinds did u get
cherokee purple, brandywine, black krim, san marzano
and basil and marigolds for companion planting
fancy lol
ok well theyre on the kitchen counter
thanks babe
starting the seedlings today 🌱
ooh exciting!! send me pics
will do
got them all potted up
omg they look SO good 😍
how many did u plant
like 24 total. 6 of each tomato variety
thats a lot of tomatoes babe 😂
we're gonna have the best garden this year
hey have u thought about taxes yet
turbotax keeps emailing me lol
yeah i saw those
actually i was thinking we should see a cpa this year
really? turbotax has been fine tho
isnt a cpa kinda expensive
not that bad. like 300
taxes are getting more complicated with the mortgage and everything
i mean we could just itemize in turbotax
id rather have someone look at everything tbh
ok fair
u know a place?
harris and associates on glenwood. ill make the appt
just spent 2 hours in the garden. feels good
on a sunday? love that for u 😊
hows the weather
perfect. like 65 and sunny
jealous im inside grading 🙄
hey babe what do u want for dinner
whatever is good w me
helpful lol 🙄
i was thinking tacos
sounds perfect
hey babe should we check the savings for outer banks planning? 🏖️
maya said its gonna book up fast
yeah maybe this weekend
ok! i was thinking like a week in june?? ☀️
we should have plenty saved up
sounds good lets talk about it
ok love u ❤️
hey how'd it go with the cpa
good actually
pretty straightforward this year
nice
how much do we owe
we're getting a refund actually
like 1800
omg yay 🎉🎉
outer banks fund lol
haha exactly
did she say anything about the mortgage stuff
yeah standard deduction was better than itemizing this year
lol so turbotax woulda been fine 😂
probably but now we know for sure
true. love u ❤️
got khruangbin tix for may 16
yes!! finally
bida manda before?
yeah ill book
look at these babies
WAIT
are those the tomatoes??
yep! cherokee purples are already like 6 inches tall
omggg 😍😍
the brandywines are doing great too
u should move ur basil closer to them
yeah thats the plan. companion planting
basil next to the tomatoes, marigolds along the edges
look at u being all scientific 😂
i read the nc state extension newsletter ok
nerd
but i love it ❤️
transplanting everything outside next weekend if the weather holds
ill help!!
deal

its been like a year right
yeah. they can come friday morning at 9
can u be home for it
friday... 🤔
yeah i can go in late. ill be there
cool ill book it
how much is it
189 for the annual service
thats not bad
remember the furnace thing last winter lol
dont remind me
do they need inside access or just the outside unit
both probably. indoor unit is in the garage
ok ill make sure its clear
thanks babe
hey so I was looking at outer banks rentals for august and there are some really cute places in duck. want to look together this weekend?
im going to pull up the savings account tonight so we can figure out a budget. should be around 16k right? i think we could do a really nice week for like 3-4k
Hey D! Been thinking about you. How are things at CarePoint?
hey carlotta! doing alright. busy with SOC 2 stuff
how are things in charlotte
Charlotte is great honestly. Tryon has been such a good fit. The team here is really coming together.
SOC 2 sounds fun 😂 Hang in there.
haha yeah. good to hear youre doing well
Hey D, how are things going with the promotion track?
honestly not great. vernon keeps bringing up attendance and stamina
feels like the goalposts keep moving
That doesn't sound right. Your work speaks for itself.
Listen, I didn't want to bring this up out of nowhere, but we're building something real here at Tryon. I keep thinking you'd be perfect for it.
what do you mean
Let me put some thoughts together. Just know that you deserve better than what it sounds like you're getting. Talk soon D.
Ok D, here's the deal. Tryon is opening a Senior IT Manager position. Reports directly to me.
Building out the entire ops infrastructure from scratch. Pay is significantly better. Full benefits, relocation assistance.
wow ok. whats the base
Targeting $72K for the right candidate. I'd be pushing for you. 😊
thats a big jump
You'd be running your own team D. No one questioning your stamina or watching your sick days.
not gonna lie that sounds really appealing right now
I had HR put together the details. They'll reach out to your personal email. Just a phone screen to start.
ok yeah im interested. thanks carlotta
Hey D! How did the call go Friday? I've been dying to hear.
i think it went really well. the HR person was great
asked about my EHR experience and infrastructure work
That's exactly what I expected. They want someone who knows healthcare IT.
they emailed me about an on-site. april 10
Perfect! Quick question since you're coming from CarePoint — what EHR vendor are they on? Want to think about compatibility.
epic. been on it about 3 years
Good to know. That's helpful for planning. Talk soon D 😊
Big day tomorrow! How are you feeling?
nervous honestly
You're going to do great. Business casual, you'll meet the CTO and infrastructure lead.
They might ask about migration planning. Like vendor-to-vendor moves.
yeah i was involved in the epic migration at carepoint. big project
That's exactly what they want to hear. Good luck D! 🙏
So?? How was it?
amazing honestly. the office is great. team was really welcoming
they showed me the whole infrastructure roadmap. greenfield buildout
See? This is the kind of opportunity that doesn't come around twice.
they said theyd get back to me within the week
I have a good feeling about this 😊
Hey D, quick question. What does CarePoint use for ticketing?
servicenow
And the AD setup — Azure or on-prem?
hybrid. mostly on-prem migrating to azure
Super helpful D. Exactly what I needed for planning. I'm pushing on the offer. Hang tight 🤞
thanks carlotta
D!! Did you see the email?? 🎉
just opened it. 72K plus relocation
So happy for you. We're going to do great things together.
i need to think about it. elena doesnt know about any of this
Take your time. But they'll want an answer within the week. Whatever you decide, I'm proud of you D. Thinking of you — C 🙏
Hey D, just got off a call with my VP. They're putting the final comp package together for you. Should have numbers by Friday.

Can you talk tonight around 9? Want to walk you through what to expect and prep you for the negotiation. Also, what's your current base at CarePoint? They asked me so they can structure the offer to beat it.

Oh nice yeah that's right on my way in! What time do you need to be there?

Perfect I'll swing by the dealer at like 7:35ish? We'll be at the office by 8 easy

No worries at all! 🙏

Hey Daniel, quick heads up

Patricia from compliance came by my desk yesterday and asked about a Linear ticket from January — some kind of EHR access permissions test? She said it was under your name but wanted to know if I was involved in the testing at all.
I told her I'd check with you. Should I just tell her to reach out to you directly? Or was this part of that SOC 2 prep stuff?
